svg.title: Keanu Maleeq Koelewijn Software Engineer profile card
svg.desc: Tall centered profile card for Keanu Maleeq Koelewijn, Software Engineer working on Linux-based robotics software.

text.font-family: Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif

svg.text: Welcome to my profile, I am

text.font-family: Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
text.tspan: Working on Linux-based software development for robotics,
mainly focused on autonomous robot systems.

text.font-family: Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
text.tspan: Experience includes ROS2, Python backend development, C++/Qt RViz2 panels,
user interfaces, Docker, Behaviour Trees, Blackboard-based state handling,

text.font-family: Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
text.tspan: Currently helping give an autonomous assistance robot a voice by combining
OpenAI Realtime conversations, sensor-aware context, function calling,
and intent-based task execution through Behaviour Trees.

text.font-family: Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
text.tspan: Also researching custom hotword models using small, high-quality datasets,
while improving prompt design, token efficiency, and reliable LLM behaviour.

text.font-family: Times New Roman, Times, Georgia, serif
text.tspan: Continuously learning through modern technologies, software architecture,
